description: Canonical index for this Storybook pattern. Use with Docs.mdx; do not treat the Canvas Code tab alone as the full implementation.

styles.note: Single SCSS file with /* @split-view-section: … */ markers; split at build time by splitViewCss.ts

integrationOrder: Import and call registerSplitViewPattern / registerSplitViewCodeRail with strings from splitViewCss (see splitView.stories.js).
Import design-system components used by the story.
Use <split-view-pattern> with named slots pane-1, pane-2, and optionally pane-3.
Optional end-pane code: wrap kyn-block-code-view in split-view-code-rail for flush rail behavior.
